# nfc-kartvizit
[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27706366/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Gökhan Esenyel – Ziraat Katılım Bankası</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Serif+4:wght@700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
* { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

body {
  background: #f2f2f2;
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  min-height: 100vh;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
}

.page {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 480px;
  background: #f2f2f2;
  min-height: 100vh;
}

/* ── TOP CARD: Photo + Info ── */
.top-card {
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 18px;
  margin: 16px 16px 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
}

.top-inner {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 145px 1fr;
  min-height: 220px;
}

.photo-col {
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.photo-col img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: top center;
  display: block;
}

.info-col {
  padding: 18px 16px 14px 14px;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  position: relative;
}

.brand-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.brand-logo {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 5px;
}

.brand-logo-text {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #111;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.brand-logo-text span { font-weight: 300; }

.brand-tagline {
  font-size: 8px;
  color: #888;
  display: block;
}

.person-name {
  font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif;
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #111;
  line-height: 1.1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.person-title {
  font-size: 11.5px;
  color: #444;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.4;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.red-line {
  width: 28px;
  height: 2.5px;
  background: #C8102E;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.zk-logo-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}

.zk-logo-text {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: #111;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.zk-logo-text span { font-weight: 400; }

/* CTA Buttons */
.cta-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 12px 16px 16px;
  justify-content: flex-end;
  align-items: center;
  border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
}

.cta-btn {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 7px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: 1.5px solid #ddd;
  color: #222;
  background: #fff;
  transition: background 0.15s;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.cta-btn.red {
  background: #C8102E;
  border-color: #C8102E;
  color: #fff;
}

.cta-btn svg { flex-shrink: 0; }

/* ── QUICK ACTIONS CARD ── */
.quick-card {
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 18px;
  margin: 0 16px 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.quick-btn {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 4px;
  padding: 18px 14px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #111;
  border-right: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
  transition: background 0.15s;
}

.quick-btn:last-child { border-right: none; }
.quick-btn:active { background: #fafafa; }

.quick-icon-wrap {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  background: #C8102E;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.quick-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #111;
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.quick-sub {
  font-size: 10px;
  color: #888;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 2px;
}

/* ── CONTACT CARD ── */
.contact-card {
  background: #fff;
  border-radius: 18px;
  margin: 0 16px 12px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}

.contact-header {
  padding: 18px 18px 6px;
}

.contact-title {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #111;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.contact-red-line {
  width: 28px;
  height: 2.5px;
  background: #C8102E;
}

.building-img {
  position: absolute;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  width: 160px;
  opacity: 0.18;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.contact-list {
  padding: 10px 0 16px;
}

.contact-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  padding: 12px 18px;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #222;
  font-size: 13px;
  transition: background 0.12s;
}

.contact-row:active { background: #fafafa; }

.c-icon {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff0f2;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
.footer {
  background: #C8102E;
  margin: 4px 0 0;
  padding: 20px 24px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.footer-left {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 4px;
}

.footer-brand-name {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.footer-tagline {
  font-size: 10px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  font-weight: 400;
}

.footer-socials {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
}

.social-circle {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #fff;
}

/* ZK SVG Logo */
.zk-emblem { width: 20px; height: 20px; }
.zk-emblem-sm { width: 16px; height: 16px; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="page">

  <!-- TOP CARD -->
  <div class="top-card">
    <div class="top-inner">
      <!-- Photo -->
      <div class="photo-col">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Gökhan Esenyel">
      </div>

      <!-- Info -->
      <div class="info-col">
        <!-- Brand top right -->
        <div class="brand-row">
          <div class="brand-logo">
            <svg class="zk-emblem" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
              <path d="M5 32L20 8L35 32H5Z" fill="#C8102E"/>
              <path d="M13 32L20 20L27 32H13Z" fill="#fff"/>
            </svg>
            <div>
              <div class="brand-logo-text"><span>Ziraat </span>Katılım</div>
              <span class="brand-tagline">Paylaştıkça daha fazlası</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="person-name">Gökhan<br>Esenyel</div>
        <div class="person-title">Tedarik ve Hizmet Yönetimi<br>Bölüm Başkanı</div>
        <div class="red-line"></div>

        <div class="zk-logo-row">
          <svg class="zk-emblem-sm" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none">
            <path d="M5 32L20 8L35 32H5Z" fill="#C8102E"/>
            <path d="M13 32L20 20L27 32H13Z" fill="#fff"/>
          </svg>
          <div class="zk-logo-text"><span>Ziraat </span>Katılım Bankası</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CTA Row -->
    <div class="cta-row">
      <a class="cta-btn red" href="tel:+905333690300">
        <svg width="15" height="15" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2.2">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 5a2 2 0 012-2h3.28a1 1 0 01.948.684l1.498 4.493a1 1 0 01-.502 1.21l-2.257 1.13a11.042 11.042 0 005.516 5.516l1.13-2.257a1 1 0 011.21-.502l4.493 1.498a1 1 0 01.684.949V19a2 2 0 01-2 2h-1C9.716 21 3 14.284 3 6V5z"/>
        </svg>
        Hemen Ara
      </a>
      <a class="cta-btn" href="mailto:gokhan.esenyel@ziraatkatilim.com.tr">
        <svg width="15" height="15" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#C8102E" stroke-width="2">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z"/>
        </svg>
        Mail Gönder
      </a>
      <a class="cta-btn" href="https://www.ziraatkatilim.com.tr" target="_blank">
        <svg width="15" height="15" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#C8102E" stroke-width="2">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 12a9 9 0 01-9 9m9-9a9 9 0 00-9-9m9 9H3m9 9a9 9 0 01-9-9m9 9c1.657 0 3-4.03 3-9s-1.343-9-3-9m0 18c-1.657 0-3-4.03-3-9s1.343-9 3-9m-9 9a9 9 0 019-9"/>
        </svg>
        Web Sitesi
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- QUICK ACTIONS -->
  <div class="quick-card">
    <a class="quick-btn" href="#" onclick="downloadVCard();return false;">
      <div class="quick-icon-wrap">
        <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M16 7a4 4 0 11-8 0 4 4 0 018 0zM12 14a7 7 0 00-7 7h14a7 7 0 00-7-7z"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="quick-label">Rehbere Kaydet</div>
      <div class="quick-sub">vCard İndir &rsaquo;</div>
    </a>

    <a class="quick-btn" href="https://maps.google.com/?q=Istanbul+Finans+Merkezi+Umraniye+Istanbul" target="_blank">
      <div class="quick-icon-wrap">
        <svg width="20" height="20" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2">
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.657 16.657L13.414 20.9a1.998 1.998 0 01-2.827 0l-4.244-4.243a8 8 0 1111.314 0z"/>
          <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 11a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="quick-label">Konum Aç</div>
      <div class="quick-sub">Haritada Göster &rsaquo;</div>
    </a>

    <a class="quick-btn" href="https://wa.me/905333690300" target="_blank">
      <div class="quick-icon-wrap">
        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#fff">
          <path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="quick-label">WhatsApp</div>
      <div class="quick-sub">İletişime Geç &rsaquo;</div>
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- CONTACT INFO -->
  <div class="contact-card">
    <div class="contact-header">
      <div class="contact-title">İletişim Bilgilerim</div>
      <div class="contact-red-line"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- building watermark -->
    <svg class="building-img" viewBox="0 0 200 300" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <rect x="60" y="20" width="40" height="280" fill="#999" opacity="0.4"/>
      <rect x="65" y="25" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="77" y="25" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="89" y="25" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="65" y="42" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="77" y="42" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="89" y="42" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="65" y="59" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="77" y="59" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="89" y="59" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="65" y="76" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="77" y="76" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="89" y="76" width="8" height="12" fill="#bbb" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="100" y="60" width="32" height="240" fill="#aaa" opacity="0.3"/>
      <rect x="104" y="65" width="6" height="10" fill="#ccc" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="114" y="65" width="6" height="10" fill="#ccc" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="124" y="65" width="6" height="10" fill="#ccc" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="104" y="80" width="6" height="10" fill="#ccc" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="114" y="80" width="6" height="10" fill="#ccc" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="124" y="80" width="6" height="10" fill="#ccc" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="104" y="95" width="6" height="10" fill="#ccc" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="114" y="95" width="6" height="10" fill="#ccc" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="124" y="95" width="6" height="10" fill="#ccc" opacity="0.5"/>
      <rect x="30" y="100" width="28" height="200" fill="#888" opacity="0.25"/>
    </svg>

    <div class="contact-list">
      <a class="contact-row" href="mailto:gokhan.esenyel@ziraatkatilim.com.tr">
        <div class="c-icon">
          <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#C8102E" stroke-width="2">
            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 8l7.89 5.26a2 2 0 002.22 0L21 8M5 19h14a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2H5a2 2 0 00-2 2v10a2 2 0 002 2z"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        gokhan.esenyel@ziraatkatilim.com.tr
      </a>

      <a class="contact-row" href="tel:+905333690300">
        <div class="c-icon">
          <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#C8102E" stroke-width="2">
            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M3 5a2 2 0 012-2h3.28a1 1 0 01.948.684l1.498 4.493a1 1 0 01-.502 1.21l-2.257 1.13a11.042 11.042 0 005.516 5.516l1.13-2.257a1 1 0 011.21-.502l4.493 1.498a1 1 0 01.684.949V19a2 2 0 01-2 2h-1C9.716 21 3 14.284 3 6V5z"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        +90 533 369 0300
      </a>

      <a class="contact-row" href="https://maps.google.com/?q=Istanbul+Finans+Merkezi+Umraniye+Istanbul" target="_blank">
        <div class="c-icon">
          <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#C8102E" stroke-width="2">
            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M17.657 16.657L13.414 20.9a1.998 1.998 0 01-2.827 0l-4.244-4.243a8 8 0 1111.314 0z"/>
            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15 11a3 3 0 11-6 0 3 3 0 016 0z"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        İstanbul Finans Merkezi – Ümraniye / İstanbul
      </a>

      <a class="contact-row" href="https://www.ziraatkatilim.com.tr" target="_blank">
        <div class="c-icon">
          <svg width="16" height="16" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="#C8102E" stroke-width="2">
            <path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M21 12a9 9 0 01-9 9m9-9a9 9 0 00-9-9m9 9H3m9 9a9 9 0 01-9-9m9 9c1.657 0 3-4.03 3-9s-1.343-9-3-9m0 18c-1.657 0-3-4.03-3-9s1.343-9 3-9m-9 9a9 9 0 019-9"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        www.ziraatkatilim.com.tr
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <div class="footer">
    <div class="footer-left">
      <div class="footer-brand-name">
        <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 40 40" fill="none">
          <path d="M5 32L20 8L35 32H5Z" fill="#fff"/>
          <path d="M13 32L20 20L27 32H13Z" fill="#C8102E"/>
        </svg>
        <span>Ziraat Katılım Bankası</span>
      </div>
      <div class="footer-tagline">Resmi iletişim kanallarıdır.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-socials">
      <a class="social-circle" href="https://linkedin.com/company/ziraat-katilim-bankasi" target="_blank">
        <svg width="14" height="14" fill="#fff" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
          <path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433a2.062 2.062 0 01-2.063-2.065 2.064 2.064 0 112.063 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/>
        </svg>
      </a>
      <a class="social-circle" href="https://instagram.com/ziraatkatilim" target="_blank">
        <svg width="14" height="14" fill="#fff" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
          <path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838a6.162 6.162 0 100 12.324 6.162 6.162 0 000-12.324zM12 16a4 4 0 110-8 4 4 0 010 8zm6.406-11.845a1.44 1.44 0 100 2.881 1.44 1.44 0 000-2.881z"/>
        </svg>
      </a>
      <a class="social-circle" href="https://youtube.com/@ziraatkatilim" target="_blank">
        <svg width="14" height="14" fill="#fff" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
          <path d="M23.498 6.186a3.016 3.016 0 00-2.122-2.136C19.505 3.545 12 3.545 12 3.545s-7.505 0-9.377.505A3.017 3.017 0 00.502 6.186C0 8.07 0 12 0 12s0 3.93.502 5.814a3.016 3.016 0 002.122 2.136c1.871.505 9.376.505 9.376.505s7.505 0 9.377-.505a3.015 3.015 0 002.122-2.136C24 15.93 24 12 24 12s0-3.93-.502-5.814zM9.545 15.568V8.432L15.818 12l-6.273 3.568z"/>
        </svg>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<script>
function downloadVCard() {
  const vcard = `BEGIN:VCARD\nVERSION:3.0\nFN:Gökhan Esenyel\nN:Esenyel;Gökhan;;;\nORG:Ziraat Katılım Bankası\nTITLE:Tedarik ve Hizmet Yönetimi Bölüm Başkanı\nTEL;TYPE=CELL:+905333690300\nEMAIL:gokhan.esenyel@ziraatkatilim.com.tr\nADR;TYPE=WORK:;;İstanbul Finans Merkezi;Ümraniye;İstanbul;;Türkiye\nURL:https://www.ziraatkatilim.com.tr\nEND:VCARD`;
  const blob = new Blob([vcard], { type: 'text/vcard' });
  const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
  const a = document.createElement('a');
  a.href = url;
  a.download = 'gokhan-esenyel.vcf';
  a.click();
  URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
